scripts.check:ci: cargo fmt --check --all && cargo check --workspace --locked && cargo test --workspace --locked && pnpm build && pnpm smoke && pnpm build:test-helpers && pnpm smoke:panic && pnpm build
scripts.check:musl: cargo check --workspace --locked && cargo test --workspace --locked && pnpm build && pnpm smoke && pnpm build:test-helpers && pnpm smoke:panic && pnpm build
